info.name: PropertyX — Document Templates
info.description:
Sample requests for the document-template designer backend.

Set the collection variables first:
- `baseUrl`  e.g. http://propertyx.test
- `company`  the company id in the URL
- `token`    a Sanctum bearer token
- `templateId`, `modelId` as you go.

All requests send `Accept: application/json` and Bearer auth.
